3336530.name: Embers Adrift
3336530.description:
Welcome to Embers Adrift, Drifter! You've escaped the war-torn lands of the south by choosing to take your chances in the dreaded Darklands. After a grueling journey that has left your body wounded and your mind and memories scattered you discover the Great Chasm and a single solitary rope-bridge spanning across it. You hear pleasant tones inviting you across the bridge and discover drifter's landing. Not everyone escapes the Darklands, only the strong. You discover the City of Newhaven and its struggling inhabitants. After recovering with their help it is your turn to help them survive! Enter the lands north of the Old Wall, fight the Exiles who plot against your new home, discover old ruins and dungeons with untold treasures and fearsome monsters, and uncover the secrets of Ember - the source of powerful magic!

Embers Adrift is a unique fantasy PvE MMORPG with limited PvP in the arena. Whether you prefer solo play or group play there is something for everyone. Group-based content will bring you into the deepest, darkest corners of the world where the strongest monsters and loot can be found, while solo-content offers its own dangers and rare loot. Fight to level 50 and discover the unique progression our end-game content offers. Embers Adrift focuses on community, challenging content, immersion, rich lore, campaign-like quests sometimes with various endings, and is built on design principles found in classic MMOs. We hope you enjoy your stay in Embers Adrift. 

Key Features:

  • Core Gameplay

    • PvE-first experience in a unique fantasy world, with optional arena-based PvP

    • Strategic tab-target combat emphasizing defensive and offensive teamwork

    • Content designed for solo players, small groups, and full 6-player parties

    • 24-player raids for epic group challenges

  • World & Immersion

    • Lore-rich world with mysteries unfolding throughout your journey

    • Static, dynamic, and rare campaign-like quests with different choices and different outcomes

    • Day/Night cycles and seasonal changes that impact mobs and environments

    • Dynamic, region-specific soundtrack that reacts to gameplay

    • Immersive environmental navigation

    • Useful light sources, including ground torches set by players as beacons

    • Vast overland zones and dungeons

    • Dynamic dungeon entrances with their own mob sets and rare mobs for solo and group play

    • Unique AI and aggro system

  • Progression & Systems

    • Nine unique classes including crowd control

    • Unique fantasy magic system "Alchemy" (Ember use) that all players can utilize

    • Item augmentation system

    • Crafting with 3 gathering roles, 6 crafting professions, and material-driven benefits

    • Imbue crafted items with the magic of Ember

    • Weapon and Armor augmentation system

    • Unique death penalty system (no experience loss)

    • Layered equipment and asymmetrical gearing options

    • Editable character appearance at anytime via character select screen

  • Social & Community

    • GM-run in game events that award "bloops;" a special currency that can be used to purchase unique titles, emotes, and more

    • Shared banks for all characters and personal stashes per character

    • Fast travel system for easier grouping and exploration

    • Optional vanity pets and cosmetic personalization

  • No cash shops, microtransactions, loot boxes, or NFTs

  • Active development team that communicates with the players

  • Optional Subscription (see below)

OPTIONAL SUBSCRIPTION TIME:

In lieu of microtransactions, Embers Adrift offers optional subscription time. Non-subscribers have full access to the game world, unrestricted character roles & specializations, and full access to their inventory space (adventuring + gathering bags). Subscribers gain the following additional perks:

  • +7 additional active character slots

  • Expanded bank storage

  • Additional mail attachment slots

  • Double Auction House limits

  • Discounted event merchant

  • Drifters Crafting Station (portable, usable by any nearby player)

  • Ember Ring healing enhancement bonus (applies to all nearby players)

  • Follow command

  • Expanded emote access

  • Expanded portrait selection

  • Unique titles

  • Subscriber only chat channel

  • Provides ongoing support to Stormhaven Studios

Why Play Embers Adrift?

  • Explore a living, dangerous world where group cooperation matters but solo heroes thrive

  • Battle dangerous, unique enemies and earn meaningful rewards

  • Immerse yourself in classic MMO-inspired progression, rich lore, and social gameplay

  • Experience challenging content designed for discovery, mastery, and lasting friendships

Step into Embers Adrift and carve your path through adventure, danger, and magic.
